set(TBB_BUILD_STATIC ON CACHE BOOL "Build static lib" FORCE)
set(TBB_BUILD_SHARED OFF CACHE BOOL "Build SHARED LIB" FORCE)
set(TBB_BUILD_TBBMALLOC OFF CACHE BOOL "TBB_BUILD_TBBMALLOC" FORCE)
set(TBB_BUILD_TBBMALLOC_PROXY OFF CACHE BOOL "TBB_BUILD_TBBMALLOC_PROXY" FORCE)
set(TBB_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "TBB_BUILD_TESTS" FORCE)

add_subdirectory(tbb)
